name: agentfly-without-finetuning
description: Enable LLMs as agents without fine-tuning through structured prompting and tool augmentation. Zero-shot agent capabilities via prompt engineering, dynamic tool selection, and memory scaffolding. Covers: prompting agents, zero-shot learning, tool selection, agentic behavior, memory systems
paperTitle: AgentFly: Turning LLMs into Agents Without Fine-Tuning
